_readme: Rebuilt per Bade's feedback: (1) escalation now computed from a parameterized formula (5%/yr compounded, see src/lib/inflation.ts) rather than a hardcoded multiplier; (2) Volume II re-checked for Tur/Groundnut/Turmeric/Banana/Grapes -- found real Pune-DIVISION data (Satara/Sangli/Solapur) for all but Cotton, replacing the weaker state-level fallback; (3) yield is shown as a single average, not a fabricated min-max spread -- profit range now comes entirely from genuine price variation where we have it.

Onion.yieldNote: Single average from source survey sample -- shown as avg, not a fabricated min-max range
Onion.priceSource: LIVE Agmarknet, Pune APMC markets, verified Jul 2026
Onion.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Onion.seasonNote: CORRECTED: Onion's third crop is called 'Rabi onion' by horticulture convention (ICAR-DOGR), but its actual calendar (transplant mid-Dec to mid-Jan, harvest April-May) matches this system's 'Summer' window (as used for Groundnut/Rice), not its 'Rabi' window (Nov-sown, Feb-March-harvested Wheat/Gram timing). Tagged Summer to reflect actual land-use timing, not the agronomy label. Still missing: 'Late Kharif' (Sept-Nov transplant), a genuine third onion season not modeled as a separate slot in this engine yet. Only Kharif economics are sourced; Summer figures reuse Kharif's as a proxy.
Onion.harvestsPerYearNote: Single bulb harvest per planting, ~95-165 DAT depending on season/variety (ICAR-DOGR, Pune). Multi-season availability already handled via 'seasons' tag, not this field.

Tomato.yieldNote: Single average from source survey sample -- shown as avg, not a fabricated min-max range
Tomato.priceSource: Real Maharashtra district range, Volume I (Pune=min)
Tomato.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Tomato.harvestsPerYearNote: Single planting-to-harvest cycle per season, ~120-150 days field duration.

Wheat.yieldNote: Single average from source survey sample -- shown as avg, not a fabricated min-max range
Wheat.priceSource: Real Maharashtra district range, Volume I
Wheat.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)

Gram_Chana.yieldNote: Single average from source survey sample -- shown as avg, not a fabricated min-max range
Gram_Chana.priceSource: Single realized price point from source table -- no real range available, NOT fabricated, engine will treat this crop as having no measured price risk | Band widened using an ASSUMED price CV of 0.218 (average of the 4 crops in this dataset with real measured price ranges: Onion, Tomato, Wheat, Sugarcane). This is a stand-in for real historical volatility, not a measurement -- flagged via priceRangeMeasured=false.
Gram_Chana.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)

This is a stand-in for real historical volatility, not a measurement -- flagged via priceRangeMeasured=false.
Rice_Bhat.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Rice_Bhat.seasonNote: Grown in both Kharif and Summer in Pune -- only Kharif economics are modeled here; Summer figures would need separate sourcing.
Rice_Bhat.harvestsPerYearNote: Single harvest, ~120-150 days depending on variety.

Jowar_Sorghum.priceSource: Single realized price point from source table -- no real range available, NOT fabricated, engine will treat this crop as having no measured price risk | Band widened using an ASSUMED price CV of 0.218 (average of the 4 crops in this dataset with real measured price ranges: Onion, Tomato, Wheat, Sugarcane). This is a stand-in for real historical volatility, not a measurement -- flagged via priceRangeMeasured=false.
Jowar_Sorghum.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Jowar_Sorghum.seasonNote: Grown in both Kharif and Rabi in Pune -- only Kharif economics are modeled here; Rabi figures would need separate sourcing.
Jowar_Sorghum.harvestsPerYearNote: Single harvest per season (Kharif ~100-120 days, Rabi ~130-150 days).

Sugarcane.yieldNote: Single average from source survey sample -- shown as avg, not a fabricated min-max range
Sugarcane.priceSource: Real Maharashtra district range, Volume I
Sugarcane.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Sugarcane.harvestsPerYearNote: REAL CORRECTION: Maharashtra's dominant planting types run 14-18 months, not 12 -- Adsali (July-Aug planting, most preferred in Maharashtra specifically) runs 15-18 months; Suru (Jan-Feb) ~12 months; Pre-seasonal (Oct-Nov) 13-15 months. Using ~14.5-month blended average -> 12/14.5 = 0.83. Source: multiple agri-extension references (Dhanuka, ICL, BharatAgri) citing standard Maharashtra sugarcane season classifications. Previously hardcoded to 1, overstating annual profit ~17-20%.

This is a stand-in for real historical volatility, not a measurement -- flagged via priceRangeMeasured=false.
Pomegranate.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_district_specific, escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Pomegranate.harvestsPerYearNote: ICAR-NRCP (Solapur) confirms commercial growers take ONE bahar (of 3 biologically possible: Ambe/Mrig/Hasta) per year deliberately, for fruit quality and tree health.

Turmeric.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_division_regional_proxy (Satara), escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Turmeric.harvestsPerYearNote: Confirmed NOT perennial -- single Kharif harvest, ~240-270 days (8-9 months).

Banana.harvestsPerYearNote: Maharashtra Basrai/G9 varieties mature ~11-12 months -- close enough to annual that 1 is a reasonable approximation, not a meaningful correction like Sugarcane.

Grapes.source: Maharashtra DES Volume II, pune_division_regional_proxy (Solapur), escalated 1.477x (5%/yr 2018->2026)
Grapes.harvestsPerYearNote: ICAR-NRC Grapes (Pune): Hot Tropical Region (Nashik/Pune/Sangli/Solapur/Satara) uses single pruning, single harvest per year as accepted practice.

Cotton.yieldNote: State-level average productivity (Volume I) -- Cotton has zero Pune-division representation in this survey, confirmed on re-check.
Cotton.priceSource: State-level single realized price point, escalated -- no real range available for Cotton | Band widened using an ASSUMED price CV of 0.218 (average of the 4 crops in this dataset with real measured price ranges: Onion, Tomato, Wheat, Sugarcane). This is a stand-in for real historical volatility, not a measurement -- flagged via priceRangeMeasured=false.
Cotton.source: Maharashtra DES Volume I, STATE-LEVEL ONLY (confirmed no Pune-division data exists), escalated 1.477x
Cotton.harvestsPerYearNote: Single Kharif harvest (picked in multiple rounds from one planting, but one crop cycle per year), ~150-180 days.
